privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.corePromise: Core Promise: No Storage, No Training
privacy.intro: Welcome to Aihere. We understand that developers' business data is highly sensitive and confidential. This Privacy Policy explains transparently what data we collect and, more importantly, what data we never touch.
privacy.section1Intro: As an API routing layer, we strictly follow the principle of being a transmission channel only:
section1Items: We never cache prompts or responses. Your system instructions, conversation context, uploaded documents or images, and model outputs are destroyed from memory immediately after being relayed through our servers and are never persisted to databases or disks in any form.
We never use your data for model training. We guarantee that none of your input or output data will be used for fine-tuning or training any AI model.
privacy.section2Intro: To operate account management and billing properly, we only collect the minimum information necessary:
section2Items: Account information: your registered email address and password (stored only as a strongly encrypted hash).
Metadata logs: used solely for billing calculations, including timestamps, provider and model name, input and output token counts, billed amount, and request status code.

Network security data: the originating IP address (for risk control, authentication, and anti-DDoS protection) and the unique transaction reference returned by payment channels. We do not store credit card details.
privacy.section3Content: Our service infrastructure is deployed in overseas data centers. This service is strictly not provided to Mainland China. We do not collect or process personal information identified as belonging to citizens located in Mainland China. If you conceal your true geographic location through technical means and cause unlawful cross-border data transfer, you will bear the legal consequences yourself.
privacy.section4Content: You retain full control over your account data at all times. On the Profile page, you may request permanent account deletion. Once deletion is triggered, your registered email address, password hash, and associated API keys will be irreversibly removed from our systems, except for anonymized billing records that must be retained lawfully for financial auditing purposes.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.restrictionContent: To comply strictly with international law and applicable regional requirements, Aihere and all API services provided through this website are not available to individuals, businesses, or any entities located in Mainland China. If you are in Mainland China or acting on behalf of a Mainland China entity, you must stop accessing and leave this website immediately. Our platform uses strict access auditing and IP tracing. If unauthorized access is detected, we may suspend the account, revoke related API keys, and refuse any refund without prior notice.
terms.section1Content: The Aihere platform (the “Platform”) is a unified API routing and aggregation relay service designed to provide developers with a standardized interface for large-model access. You understand and agree that the Platform only acts as a relay and router. The actual model responses are generated by underlying model providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, and the Platform is not responsible for the accuracy, legality, or reliability of generated content.
section2Items: You must keep your account credentials and assigned API keys secure.
Any token quota loss caused by leaked, stolen, or client-side exposed API keys is solely your responsibility.
Reselling, renting out, or publicly sharing accounts or API keys with third parties is strictly prohibited. Violations may result in permanent suspension.
terms.section3Intro: You agree not to use content generated through the Platform for any of the following activities:
section3Items: Generating or distributing illegal, pornographic, violent, hateful, or discriminatory content;
Engaging in behavior that harms cybersecurity or attacks upstream provider interfaces;
Attempting to bypass the Platform's billing system or rate limits through reverse engineering or similar means;
Using the API to generate spam or operate other malicious automated registration systems.
terms.section4Content: The Platform operates on a pay-as-you-go and prepaid-balance basis. Top-up credits may only be used to offset API usage on the Platform. Due to the nature of digital goods, no refunds will be provided once an account top-up has been completed successfully. We recommend making a small initial top-up for testing.
terms.section5Content: The Platform is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. Because service quality depends on third-party upstream providers and international network conditions, we do not guarantee uninterrupted operation. The Platform is not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential business losses resulting from service interruptions, delays, or API errors.
